reasoning: The heal heart VFX spans approximately 2–2.5 game tiles wide (~80–90px on screen), while the visible player entity on the left platform occupies roughly 1 tile (~40px). This puts the heal effect at roughly 2× player size, violating the 'NEVER larger than player' constraint. For a heal-category VFX the sprite should sit at or below player scale (ideally 50–75%). The large glowing heart with sparkle particles also visually dominates the scene, pulling focus away from gameplay elements and breaking the compact toy-diorama feel. Pixel art style and top-down perspective are internally consistent, but scale is the disqualifying issue.
